'''InterGalactic Ore (InterGal)''' was a [[Lommite/Legends|lommite]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company stationed on [[Dorvalla/Legends|Dorvalla]], and rival of [[Lommite Limited]] up until their merger into [[Dorvalla Mining]] following the [[Toom clan]] sabotages that nearly destroyed both companies. [[Caba'Zan]] was its head of security.

[[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]] also became under joint control by InterGal, as well as [[Vulca Minerals]] and [[Hydian Exploration]].<ref name="GORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>

{{Company-stub}}
